I am writing this review from the perspective of someone who supported a domestic violence survivor through an extended court case where this attorney represented the opposing party.

What I witnessed was extremely troubling from a domestic violence advocacy standpoint. This attorney presents herself as someone who works in cases involving abuse, yet the approach I observed felt aggressive, dismissive of safety concerns, and heavily focused on litigation strategy rather than the well-being of the victim and children involved.

I personally observed evidence of abusive behavior being discussed during the case, and it was clear to me that the survivor’s fear and lived experience were not treated with the seriousness they deserved. Instead, the process appeared to prioritize technical arguments and courtroom positioning over safety and protection. Watching a self-represented survivor face experienced counsel in that environment highlighted how vulnerable victims can be when power imbalances exist.

From my perspective as a support person and advocate, the outcome contributed to increased fear, instability, and trauma for the family involved. That is the opposite of what should happen in cases involving domestic violence.

Anyone seeking representation in a case involving abuse should ask very direct questions about how an attorney approaches survivor safety, power dynamics, and coercive control because those factors matter enormously. I wouldn’t recommend this attorney to anyone.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Javier this is attorney Alexander Napolin. Many people believe that if they fall in a store that the store is automatically liable, but that isn’t a true belief. Slip and falls are notoriously difficult cases because the injury victim must prove that the store failed to take reasonable care of their premises. Oftentimes the store is able to completely defense the case and the plaintiff takes nothing after a trial and many years of litigation. In your case I was able to extract a settlement in less than two years in the face of a very difficult fight. The time frame often feels long for the injury victim, but it takes time to obtain medical treatments and the wheels of justice grind slowly.

Considering your treatment went beyond the one year mark, that’s not a long case compared to most. If we had gone to a trial it would have taken many more years than it did. I’m sorry that I was not able to extract more from the store, but I believe it was a good settlement considering the risks of continuing. Also, I apologize that you felt the communication was lacking with me as Diana kept up the direct communication with you throughout the case.

You understood these points when you signed off on the settlement agreement. There’s nothing more to do now that the case has been closed for several months. Nevertheless, please call my office and ask to speak with me directly and I will be happy to take some time to explain these items further as necessary.

reviews.ownerResponse: I represented this client and achieved a tremendous result for her given the circumstances. She hired me to sue her former boss, a small business owner, for sexual harassment. Ms. Turner had only worked for eight days, then quit, claiming sexual harassment.  I took the case based on Ms. Turner's representations.  After working on the case for over a year, and spending a ton of time and money pursuing the case, the investigation revealed that there were no corroborating witnesses to any of the supposed harassing conduct. The defendant himself steadfastly denied any conduct as the client claimed. It was a classic he said/she said scenario. Even worse, the defendant had zero assets and rented his residence. The defendant’s business was a financial wreck and losing money. The defendant’s lawyer who was not being paid either, presented a stark choice to my client: either take a small settlement paid over time, or take nothing because the defendant would file bankruptcy and that would be that. When the client was presented with this choice, she chose to take the small settlement paid out over time rather than take nothing. It was a good choice. The defendant ended up making all of the monthly payments over time, and the client was paid in full. It is upsetting to hear this disgruntled client complain after the fact. All of this was explained to the client in detail, and it was the client’s choice. It is disappointing to say the least that this client, who did get a small settlement, despite the circumstances, chooses to complain about not getting rich, instead of thanking me for winning a case for her that was impossible to win. I once sued a chiropractor for sexually harassing an 18 year old office assistant. The day before I was set to ask questions of the doctor under oath at his deposition, the doctor filed bankruptcy. The sexual harassment lawsuit was stayed, and we could do nothing but await the outcome of the bankruptcy case. The bankruptcy judge found in favor of the chiropractor and discharged all of his debts, including throwing out the sexual harassment lawsuit, leaving my client with nothing, and me with a pile of bills I incurred in prosecuting my client’s case. Because of that experience, which I shared in detail to Dana, she correctly understood the significance of trying to sue a defendant with no money, no assets, and no ability to pay. She understood that spending more time and money pursuing a case where the defendant had no ability to pay was a losing proposition. She knew that if she wanted to pay the out of pocket costs to keep fighting the lawsuit, she could have done so. She knew that throwing even more money down the drain to pursue a judgment against a judgment-proof debtor was not the correct decision. She did not have to accept the settlement, it was her own personal choice. And, the choice she made to settle the lawsuit was an excellent choice indeed. Do not take this lone, disgruntled client’s story as an example. Rather, read the rest of my dozens and dozens of other clients’ glowing reviews, and compare for yourself whether this lone client is telling it accurately or not. See for yourself how this client, even though she won and got paid, is unlike all the other satisfied clients of mine. It is most unfortunate for Dana that she is disappointed in my services when her real disappointment is with the defendant who had no money or assets and could never, ever be able to make Dana rich from her case.

I got into an accident at my gym a couple of years ago.  While doing bicep curl, the handles separated from the machine and I ended punching myself in the eyes with a force of more than 90 pounds.  It turned out that the machine was poorly maintained and because of age and poor maintenance it just broke. The worker even said to me “I told the owner to replace these machines a long time ago”.  I bled profusely from the corner of my eye and after a visit to an urgent care, I was sent to an ER and diagnosed with a serious concussion.  While the incident was unfortunate, I was fortunate to find LA-OC Law group online and after reading many good reviews, I decided to call the firm.  They signed me up without any issues and the intake process was quick and hassle-free.  Then they arranged all the treatments I needed to get me back to my normal shape.  It turned out my back was impacted very severly and after countless of visits to a chiropractor and back surgeon it was determined that my back injury was serious enough to warrant a further surgery if the condition deteriorated.  My eyesight was also severely impacted where my left and right eye coordination was very distorted, and I went through mobths of therapy to get them aligned again.  The law firm arranged for all these treatments on lien (no out of pocket cost for me) and they found great pros that managed to help me.  The case was recently settled out of court with the insurance company and after the medical payments and fees, there is still a significant 5-figure compensation check that will allow me to cover for future back surgeries and follow up treatments.  LA-OC law group really made the process super easy. The staff, especially Jerry, was very professional and responsive throughout the process and I felt that was in good hands throughout the process. I am grateful I found them despite the hardship I had to go through.  Now I know who I will call if myself or someone I know get into an unfortunate injury caused by negligence to help us recover and move forward and you should too without any hesitation. These are definitely the right folks to call!  Thank you so much, LA-OC Law group!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking the time to share your story. This wasn't a case where there would be a guarantee of recovery and there were several roadblocks that made it more difficult. But they expertly handled all of that. When Mr. Mouri took over the firm, he did just as excellent of a job.

The case took FOREVER, mostly because of the COVID-19 pandemic slowing it down, but these types of things take time (again, not an easy case). But overall, the firm stood up for me, knew what they were doing, and were ready to assist every step of the way. The recovery was not going to make me rich as it was not as catastrophic as some cases are, but I was very pleased with the final result.

I was immediately impressed by the level of professionalism I experienced working with the staff, especially in contrast to my previous lawyer. The entire team was always on top of every detail of my case, making sure everything was addressed in a timely manner, which took a lot of stress off me. Despite my previous lawyers discouragement and ultimate decision to drop my case, Mr. Mouri and his team were able to settle my case and get me a settlement even larger than what I had hoped for. My accident derailed my life in many ways and caused significant physical and emotional harm, my experience with the office of Hanson and Mouri and the ultimate settlement of my case gave me the closure I needed to move forward in my life. I could not be more grateful to everyone at Hanson and Mouri and wholeheartedly recommend them without hesitation.

So I spoke with Cierra’s firm a few days ago. Admittedly, I chose to go with this law firm to support a fellow black woman, I read a bit of her story and it moved me. Now I’m grateful I didn’t chose her…
Red flags:
1. THEY’RE LYING. There’s no free consultation, it’s an intake to gather your info for them to categorize the case in their system and to also find the best point of contact to make sure you send them the retainer. I’ve had previous lawsuits, cases etc and they’re the only law firm I’ve dealt with that didn’t speak with me directly. They didn’t care about my experience.

You wouldn’t expect someone, who I assume would have an education to be in her position,  to come off as if they’re not sure what they’re doing and can’t get anything right. reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Heaven,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re very sorry to hear that your experience with our team did not meet your expectations.

To clarify, we do not advertise our intake calls as full legal consultations. Our process begins with a brief intake to better understand your legal needs and to determine whether our firm is the right fit before any retainer is requested. This is a common practice in law firms to ensure we’re efficiently allocating resources and serving clients effectively.

We also take professionalism very seriously. If you felt that the person you spoke with was unprepared or dismissive, that’s deeply concerning and not aligned with our standards. We will be reviewing your interaction internally to ensure improvements are made.

Most importantly, we strive to lead with compassion. If we missed the mark in making you feel heard and supported during what we understand is a stressful time, we sincerely apologize.

If you’re open to it, we would appreciate the opportunity to learn more and see how we might make things right. You’re welcome to contact our operations team directly at operations@cierraesqlaw.com.

Wishing you the very best as you move forward.

Warm regards,
Cierra Esq.
Founder & Managing Attorney
Law Office of Cierra Esq.

reviews.text: I’m going to be transparent regarding my experience with Cierra as my attorney. She took in my case two weeks prior to the hearing which was awesome.  She is down to earth and always responsive. She easily grasped and transcribed all court orders given by the judge. I was also blessed that the retainer fee was a fixed amount. There were a few cons hiring her however. She does not read the materials such as any RFOs or declarations filed but a separate person reads this material and prepares Cierra for the court hearings. She also reassured me multiple times that she would be fully prepared for my hearing but when she represented me, she made the assumption that we would be referred to mediation but we were not. That caused so much stress for me since she was not fully prepared. She also asked me questions regarding the case materials when all that information should have been shared with her.  She also notified me last minute that she would be late to the hearing. Her team also filed paperwork last minute but luckily it did get filed in time. The proof of service was not filed however. That also caused so much stress.  I also was not updated on the status of my case throughout the process. I felt more stress hiring Cierra but I can’t say I regret hiring her since she was effective in representing me. I felt better having her by my side than being alone.

Do not do business with this guy! Does not want to pay for cost of labor of a fence we had installed at his property.

Mid January i started talking to my neighbor to tell the landlord (Robert Spitz) about a fence i wanted to install to get rid of the nasty chain link fence that was separating our properties.

End of January we agree on $337 each to split the cost of fence and labor. The fence was completed January 27th. Few days go by renters give me a check. I open it later that night and it’s only for $223....

The next day i had called his office personally and secretary told me they needed the invoice for labor. Next day, my wife drops it off and secretary tells her they’ll receive a check in the mail....

It’s now April 9th and no check. I stopped by his office and asked about the check. They quickly say, oh he didn’t agree on labor cost etc.... i said ok well we agreed on $337 (which is less than half of total project) and i only received a check for $223.

Unfortunately i even did him the favor of him having the good side because i wanted to be a good neighbor. I would highly suggest not doing business with this guy. If this how he treats his own property i doubt he is putting the effort into his clients.

2) Scheduled a second consultation to clarify a few more things. Paid $150.
3) Retained Mr. Spitz and paid him a $2500 partial retainer fee.

This is an honest review. First off, let me say I do not care about getting my hand shook or if the attorney is direct with me. I'm also fine with paying a consultation fee as I realize that these aren't always free. I was more focused on retaining an honest attorney with good experience that is knowledgeable in real estate law. I made a poor choice is hiring Robert Spitz's firm.

After my first two consultations, Robert Spitz had me convinced that he would be able to help me resolve my real estate issue. I only retained him because I thought he would fight for me. I literally had to terminate our agreement after one day. Why? After collecting my partial retainer, his advice after "further reviewing my case" was that I should file bankruptcy. That was NEVER an option for me. Had I known that was what he would advise me, I would have never retained him.

I then proceeded to request a refund. This is what he charged me one day into retaining him and after my check cleared:

- Create file for new client .5 hours - $200
- Research and draft letter 2 hours - $800
- Review client documents .5 hours - $200
- Meeting with client to discuss status of case . 5 hours - $200

In the end, they billed me for a total of $1400. This firm misrepresented themself from the start. Don't be fooled when he boasts 30+ years of experience. I was able to solve my real estate issue without filing bankruptcy and without the help of Robert Spitz's crooked firm. His terrible legal advice and abusive fees are the reason why the people do not trust attorneys! There are good ones out there. He's just not one of them!

My experience with this law firm was highly unsatisfactory. I was involved in a No Fault accident where I was rear-ended, and the case initially appeared clear-cut. However, it turned out that the person responsible for the accident had no insurance, resulting in me receiving only the minimum insurance payout.

Regrettably, Mr. Vargas did not show interest in pursuing the individual's private assets to secure compensation for my pain and suffering. Furthermore, I found myself consistently initiating contact and inquiries about the case's progress. Each time I attempted to speak with Mr. Vargas, I was informed that he was in court, forcing me to resort to email correspondence and wait for his responses.

After some time, I was assigned another lawyer from his firm who seemed uninformed about my case, requiring me to provide a detailed explanation of the entire situation, which I found quite absurd. Following this experience, Mr. Vargas resumed handling my case. I had clearly communicated my preference to deal exclusively with Mr. Vargas as my point of contact within their firm.

In summary, my overall experience with this law firm was nothing but a hassle. Despite the impressive appearance of their offices, the service they provided was far from impressive. While their staff was friendly and helpful, I did not get that level of support. I am extremely dissatisfied with the outcome of my case. In my opinion, considering the amount of work Mr. Vargas performed, he did not deserve 1/3 of the compensation I received from my insurance company.

Furthermore, Mr. Vargas billed separately for miscellaneous expenses, significantly reducing the final amount I received. It is imperative to exercise caution when signing the contract and avoid agreeing to additional miscellaneous costs; Mr. Vargas should have received only 1/3 of the reward.

reviews.text: I thank the Lord for lawyer Fernando D. Vargas. A great man integrity a great man of no racism straight facts and the truth a person has looked up to the law as a great man and I'm honored to be a ble to be on your service to help me to receive the needs that I need and I just want to say I thank you and I appreciate you and may God bless your family and you continue to grow and help others become better.
Fernando Vargas' law office was very professional and transparent throughout the whole process. I would recommend this law firm to represent my family and friends.
Thank you for handling my case professionally and timely.

Outstanding attorney. Mr Vargas is compassionate, caring, and knowledgeable professional. He fought and negotiated our case and the final settlement was reached. We were very satisfied with the end result, it was great working with his very professional and knowledgeable staff. I highly recommend you retain Mr. Fernando Vargas for your attorney and legal assistance. Please understand these legal issues take time to resolve and settle so be patient and don’t get discouraged because Mr. Vargas and staff have you as their priority.

Throughout my experience with Mr. Vargas’ firm, their lack of care and engagement was prevalent. Despite assurances of constant communication, I found myself repeatedly reaching out for updates, with one instance of silence lasting over a year. Their incompetence became apparent as promises of regular calls went unfulfilled, forcing me to initiate contact for three years. The end came when I had to persistently inquire about the settlement, even waiting a month before they mentioned the necessary paperwork. The promised proficiency in communication, personally vouched for by Mr. Vargas, turned out to be deceptive. Choosing this firm proved to be a significant disappointment.

I couldn’t be more pleased with the representation I received from Fernando Law Firm. From start to finish, their team was professional and knowledgeable. Fernando and his team took the time to explain every detail, answered all my questions, and ensured I felt comfortable and informed at every step. His dedication truly shone through, and the results exceeded my expectations. If you’re looking for a firm that treats you like family and fights for your best interests, I highly recommend Fernando Law Firm.

The Law Offices of Fernando D. Vargas did an exceptional job representing me in my bicycle accident case. From the moment I contacted them, they were professional, knowledgeable, and compassionate. They took the time to understand the details of my accident and explained the legal process in a way that was easy to understand.
Throughout the case, Mr. Vargas and his team were always available to answer my questions and address my concerns. They fought tirelessly on my behalf, negotiating with the insurance company to secure a fair settlement. I was extremely impressed with their dedication and commitment to my case.
I highly recommend the Law Offices of Fernando D. Vargas to anyone who has been injured in a bicycle accident. They are experienced, skilled, and passionate about helping their clients achieve the best possible outcome.
Everything went smoothly they helped me get the help I needed when I was In pain I highly recommend this firm Fernando Vargas and his team go the extra mile

The entire Firm is in Tune With MrVargas . Above and beyond assisting me through the process . A great legal team to have behind you when dealing with BIG insurance company. Mr Vargas rises above ☝️ thank You 💯
Great service all around, made things quick & easy for both of us, definitely recommend Fernando Vargas!
Helped me reach a desired resolution with out any major pain points.... Would highly recommend

Mr. Vargas and his staff were very helpful.  They answered all of our questions, and demonstrated genuine concern for our well being after our accident.  I believe they all worked diligently in getting the best possible outcome for us.

I had an outstanding experience with The Law Offices of Fernando D. Vargas. From the initial consultation to the final resolution, their team exhibited exceptional professionalism and dedication. Fernando and his staff were always accessible, providing clear and thorough explanations of the legal process. Their expertise and strategic approach led to a favorable outcome in my case. I highly recommend The Law Offices of Fernando D. Vargas to anyone in need of top-notch legal representation. Thank you for your exceptional service!
This is the second time they have helped  me. Everyone was helpful and great! I would recommend this firm!

Where do I start, the Law Offices of Fernando D. Vargas are nothing short of exceptional! They fought hard to get me a nice settlement for an accident I was in. Their communication is first class I was always updated and kept in the loop on my case and what steps I needed to do. The staff is extremely friendly and as well as Mr. Vargas who excels at what he does. If you are deciding whether or not to choose this law firm for their services I urge you to look no further, I recommend them to everyone who is in need of legal help no other firm comes close to their level!
Knowledgeable attorney, and competent staff.  Patiently explained all of my options and listened to my needs
Professional and easy thank you Mr Vargas I will recommend this firm to anyone that needs help with any of their needs

I was hit by a motorcycle who ran a red light in my brand new car back in September of 2021. It took awhile but this firm was able to get a settlement for me. I really appreciated their thoughtfulness throughout the process. Mr Vargas was the only attorney out of all the attorneys I called who felt I had a valid case and understood where I was coming from. I’m very happy to be a client of their’s.
Excellent and determined services, polite and professional.

Fernando is the worst lawyer I have ever seen in my life two years he did not do anything he does not return phone calls. Also his workers are worse than him, and they do nothing but lies. I never sing anything to close my case and supposedly I did all lies do not Trust him !!!

I used this office was my first time got referred by a customer. Great Communication with all the staff and they were very on top of any updates that were available for my case. I would definitely refer all my friends and family to this office for any matter.
This office is great, they kept me in the loop and got me my settlement! So thankful for them and made the process so easy
Competitive price and good customer service.
Excellent service

First off all I'm every satisfied with my offer and the time / patience vargas and his team had with me. I'm happy I was able to choose /work with them and I would highly recommend this law office to family / friends that have any problems in the long run Fernando is nothing but honest with you . Thank you once again
Awsome law firm. Fernando law firm and staff very courteous and super friendly and helpful to me. Highly recommend and will use them again

I cannot put into words how wonderful and amazing this law firm is. Mr Vargas and all of his staff were nothing but kind, extremely informative and helpful. They were all such a blessing to work with! And I am truly grateful!! Thank you all for your hard work and dedication! If I could give a million stars I would!!!!
Marylin has been very helpful and patient with me. She has explained the process about my case.

Dear Mr. Vargas,

I want to express my sincere gratitude for the outstanding settlement you secured for my son. Your support during the legal process and ensuring that my son received his entitlement upon turning 18 means a great deal to us. Despite challenges with my sister, who held guardianship and demanded payment for his care, your efforts ensured that my son's well-deserved compensation remains rightfully his. For the past five years, he has found solace with his brothers, and your intervention protected him from any undue financial burden. Thank you for safeguarding my son's rights and for your unwavering commitment to justice.

Warm regards,
Amalia Rivera

Mr. Vargas was extremely helpful in assessing my husbands case. Not only did he take time and care in explaining the dynamics of the case, but he also explained historical insight into case assessments in terms of the multifactorial approach that can be taken in potential settlements.  I would recommend Mr. Vargas and thank him for his help!

I couldn’t thank Mr. Vargas and his team enough for helping my grandmother through her case and fighting to get what she deserved. We thank you all on the team, and a special thank you again to Ashley and Mr . Vargas!
Had a great experience with lawyer Fernando and his staff. Highly recommend!!
Mr.Vargas handled my case very well i very much recommend him.highly appreciate his work.

I am so grateful to Mr. Vargas and his team for taking care of me and my daughter we where involved in a automobile accident and the insurance company was a headache, his team was quick, professional, reliable and extremely professional they answered all my questions and concerns in a timely manner. He makes the time to call you and discuss whatever questions you have. I'm so thankful for everything he did for us!

Me and my husband were hit by a truck on the 210 freeway without any knowledge of what to do next looked for an accident lawyer and they helped us from the beginning to end! Answered any questions we had big or small and made us feel welcomed the entire time. Thank you took 1 year to settle
Great service I highly recommend
I highly recommend Mr Vargas to handle your case . He is very professional at what he does and gets you paid.
This is the 2nd case that Mr. Vargas has handled for me and my family. Excellent service and very professional. I highly recommend his services.

Mr. Vargas and his team were helpful on handling my case. They truly do go above and beyond! Grateful to be able to have them by my side.
Thank you thank you

Mr. Vargas helped me win my case! Everyone I worked with throughout this process was very friendly and professional.  They answered all my questions and concerns. Everything was straightforward and honest. Would definitely use Mr. Vargas again if I ever needed to.

I was in a car accident, due to no fault of my own, and I am so happy I chose Mr. Vargas to represent me! The legal assistants and Mr. Vargas himself were available to answer questions in a timely manner. I never had a negative experience when speaking to his office. I thank Mr. Vargas and his team for their hard work. I am more than satisfied with the work this office has done. They genuinely care about and will advocate for their clients. I highly recommend choosing this law firm.
Fernando and his team was very help and answered all the questions my wife and I had during the complicated trial. I never felt uneasy and am truly grateful for all their help.

Mr.Vargas handled Two of my cases and they were both great experiences. Him and his great team had great communication skills in explaining the process to us and the next steps. When there would be bumps in the cases Mr. Vargas and his team always found a way to smooth out the process. Honestly they were great in all aspects communication, customer service, hospitality and generosity. I would definitely recommend them to anyone who needs a good personal injury attorney. Thank you for all your help and your wonderful team as well.

This attorney office is a nightmare. I have no idea how they got all the bad reviews removed from their listing. When I was looking for an attorney, the office didn’t have bad reviews, then six months after them doing absolutely nothing, I checked reviews again to understand why I retained Fernando. They had at least six recent bad views stating exactly what I have been going through.

I was rear ended by a guy that was talking on his phone. It caused $6k in damage and $6k in medical bills. This attorney did nothing for over a year. I had to call them bi-weekly to get the case moving. After all said and done, he calls me and tells me he can only get me $2k after all said is done. Doesn’t cover damages, but it does pay him and his doctors he uses. Then he tells me to buzz off and he’ll file a motion with the court to remove himself from representing me.

But he refuses to release all interest in the case so I can’t get another attorney. DO NOT SIGN WITH THIS ATTORNEY! Do your research, you’ll find other bad reviews that he couldn’t get deleted. BEWARE, GO FAR AWAY FROM THIS LOW LIFE ATTORNEY.
Mr.Vargas and his team got us the compensation we deserved for our injuries.

Great staff I was involved in a bad car accident back in 2019. They fought for me every step of the way. I was definitely happy with their services. I would definitely recommend them to anyone who needs representation. Thank you for everything.
So sad that Mr. Kennedy is no longer with us, he had a heart larger than life. . .
Kennedy & Associates, the personal injury attorneys in Riverside, CA, were amazing.

Following an unfortunate incident in Riverside, CA, I sought the expertise of the Law Office of Kennedy & Associates. The team displayed exceptional honesty and sincerity in handling my personal injury case. Much like the previous reviewer's experience, they guided me through the complexities, ensuring I received necessary medical and therapy assistance, even after losing my insurance. Their invaluable advice on settling my vehicle insurance claim and the expedited process for securing compensation for pain and suffering highlighted their commitment. The Law Office of Kennedy & Associates proved to be a comforting ally in my time of need. I highly recommend their services for anyone seeking top-notch personal injury attorneys in Riverside, CA.

Kennedy & Associates consistently went above and beyond to successfully settle my case.   I am very happy with the outcome. They have a diverse team with a broad skillset of deep talents and experience.  Bill has the utmost integrity and always encouraged me to be honest throughout every turn of the case while providing guidance on how to achieve that without undermining the substance of the situation to a cutthroat defense. The defense was vicious. I don't know how the defense counsel can sleep at night and I was relieved to have Kennedy & Associates battling it out for me. My only regret is not meeting Bill's team sooner. Their communication is exceptional.  Although their case load is large, I was always able to get quantitative, substantive, replies  in less than 48 hours, and often immediately.  The initial consult was free and their rates are consistent with industry norms.  They were always transparent and accurate with cost and risk estimates.  There were no false promises or hidden fees.  They were quite amiable and pleasant to me.  I would not even wait until you are involved in an accident to seek out and retain such a team of dedicated professionals.  If you own a company, it is good to associate with people who have 30 years of experience in the field, like Bill.  He has definitely made a substantial contribution to the community here.   Certainly, call them before you talk to anybody's insurance adjuster.  I am thankful everyday for their help and hope you have an opportunity to work with them too because it was a rare treat indeed.
Great staff and great service!

William Kennedy is a man with a big heart and an honest approach, rare in any profession, let alone in an attorney. He represented me and my wife, a nightmare human being, over the years and became a good, no, a great friend and ally. If you need an attorney, William (Bill to his friends) is one whose services are stellar. Thank you for the friends who took my recommendation whom you helped.

I was involed in a car accident 2 years ago this Law Office was great the case was settled very quick I was very pleased. They are well organized they return you’re phone calls same day they document everything. Thank you Bill and Jessica and to all of those in the office you all were amazing I highly recommend them.

Amazing Attorneys both Mr.Armand and Mr.William. All the girls are friendly and get back to you with any doubts or questions you might have. There Office Manager Jessica is Awesome she is extremely knowledgeable and follows up with a call or text even on her days off. Thank you for my fighting for my case and winning 100%!

Id just like to say..that law office of kennedy & associate. . has been a great help for me since the beginning ...jessica which is who ive been speaken with has made sure all my questions were answered and met every one of my expections with a law office...id like to give other people a chance to know understand that if you find your self or a friend in a situation that needs that professional experience ...give them a call ask for bill Kennedy....hes the man when it comes to putting a team together for you and getting the job done...😉
Bill is the real deal attorney who gives his heart and soul to his clients.  You are lucky if you have Bill as your attorney

Attorney Armand came to me to help me with a violent and difficult situation. He was very professional and courteous with me and my wife as we are an elderly retired couple. My wife and I thank you and recommend these attorney group specially to seniors.
If you need a great accident lawyer, he's the one. He fights hard for you and so does his girls!
Yes! He stands by his words, he fight for you. He is a Lawyer who cares and has a big heart and  great person. Blessing Mr. Kennedy. You care.

To Whom It May Concern,

I am a client, a very satisfied client, of the Law Offices of Kennedy & Associates, Inc. I obtained their services almost a year ago to conduct the law suit against a person who physically hit me with her car.
Their care and concern for my due claim was far more expected than I could have ever imagined.

Jessica, their associate, was extremely on top of my case. She dealt with those who were due money, reducing their charges.

I would recomend the Law Offices of Kennedy & Associates, Inc. to anyone. They are honest, have integraty, reliability and are fully trust worthy. They are #1 in my book.  Sincerely, Kay Polzin
A very good group of lawyers helped me with my case

I’m writing this review on behalf of my boyfriend, he had written one four years ago but google must of deleted it. He wanted to thank Alejo Lugo and his associates for the help and representation they offered him in multiple cases. He helped my boyfriend in a juvenile case where the court attempted to send him to trial as an adult, but Mr Lugo was able to resolve this case in juvenile court and helped achieve the best possible outcome. As mentioned Mr Lugo has helped my boyfriend resolve multiple cases including one case where he got the charges completely dismissed. Lastly I would like to say if you’re ever in need of representation or legal assistance Alejo Lugo and his associates are my go to recommendation, forever grateful and thankful for the help you offered us.

Thank you, attorney Alejo Lugo. When I needed your help, you offered me your support. My case was truly complicated. I got out of jail, and thanks to your help, I never went back. You found him very professional in what he does, and he takes things calmly. It might seem like he won't get you out of trouble, but in the end, he's a true professional. That's why I give him 5 stars.

I had an amazing experience with the Law Office of Alejo Lugo & Associates. They were professional, patient, and truly cared about helping me. They explained everything clearly and made me feel supported throughout my case. I’m very grateful for their help and highly recommend them.
Excellent lawyer

Just wanted to tell you to find a good, honest lawyer who is very dedicated to their profession! And Attorney Alejo Lugo & Associates is the right one for your criminal and immigration problems!!! They helped my husband a lot.

(My husband is a resident, had criminal issues, and they managed to prevent his deportation and not only that, but he also avoided jail time)!!!! Highly recommended.
Great service! Attorney Lugo was very helpful and answered all my questions. He helped me clean my record and made the whole process easy to understand. Highly recommend!
I recommend them. They've helped my wife and me for a long time—my wife with immigration and me with serious criminal problems, and now we're going to move on to immigration. I recommend them!

A professional and responsible lawyer who helped me a lot with my immigration case, and thanks to him I got my green card in less time than I imagined. His staff is very friendly and helps with any questions. I recommend Attorney Lugo 100%.

Great Attorney guides you through every aspect of your case knowledge and friendly staff I 100% recommend this firm they specialize in many different types of legal services they helped me with my moms status and the process was fast and smooth they are bilingual which really helped keep my mom in the loop throughout the whole process
Excellent lawyers, with many years of experience in Immigration cases, Criminal Defense, Family Cases, Vehicle Accidents and others; supporting the Hispanic community in Southern California.

I had a great experience with Alejo Lugo Law Firm. The team was professional, attentive, and always made sure I understood every step of the process. They handled my case with care and kept me informed from start to finish. I highly recommend them to anyone in need of legal help!

Outstanding Law Firm That Truly Cares!

I can’t say enough good things about Lugo Law Firm. From the moment you walk through their doors, you can tell this is a team that genuinely cares about their clients. They take the time to listen, explain every step, and fight hard for your rights.

Whether it’s criminal defense, DUI, domestic violence, or even federal cases, the attorneys at Lugo Law bring an incredible level of knowledge, confidence, and compassion. They don’t just see you as another case — they treat you like a person whose future matters.

Their experience in everything from expungements to felony defense and personal injury really shows. They’re smart, strategic, and relentless in the courtroom. You can tell they’ve handled some of the toughest cases and know exactly how to navigate the system.

What stood out most to me is how responsive and understanding they are. They walk you through every part of the process, answer your questions honestly, and make sure you feel supported the whole way.

If you ever find yourself needing strong, dependable legal help, I highly recommend Lugo Law Firm. They’re professional, passionate, and absolutely dedicated to getting the best possible outcome for their clients.

The best attorney in all of the Inland Empire I inquired about my case with many different attorneys but Lugo was the only one who made me feel confident due to him being so knowledgeable and I was more than content with the outcome of my case. For anyone looking for a dedicated and professional attorney I 10/10 recommend they consult with Lugo his staff is very helpful, friendly and always answered my questions.

Such amazing work within this Law Firm, really recommend this agency helped in every-way possible in resolving my case.
Thank you, very much Mr. Lugo
Very good lawyer, I recommend him.

00000 STARS
Let me tell you about all the ways Mr. Lugo & his associates completely failed my father in law, and how that led to him getting DETAINED BY ICE.

1. They sent in a representative, whose credentials should be questioned, to my father in law's LAST immigration interview to become a citizen, & he did NOTHING to help.
2. He showed up almost 30 minutes late, shoelaces &  tie untied, in a completely disheveled appearance. Then he had to audacity to have them wait LONGER because, "He needed a few moments in the bathroom to put himself together."
3. When asked by the interviewer simple questions, that he should have known about the case, the most he could provide were "I don't know," answers.
4. When my mother in law called his main attorney, (the one that didn't show up to his final interview,) he claimed that things could always come up, & he could not have guaranteed them to always be there.
5. My father in law was told to go make a copy of his ID, at the end of his interview. When he went to do that, that is where ICE agents were waiting for him. The firm representative that they sent, was no help AT ALL. He claimed that it was out of his hands, and all they could do was wait. Then ghosted my family & left the building.

DO NOT give this firm your money. They are unreliable, unprofessional, & untrustworthy. I understand that because of the recent change in the law that happened on 9/6/25, the process has become a lot more difficult. However, this does not excuse the pathetic excuse of legal support that they provided my father in law.
ESTAFADORES!!!

Thanks to this lawyer, my family and I are doing very well. He is an excellent lawyer, very kind and respectful in his daily dealings with us as Latinos. Thank you very much for your help and support. Blessings.
Thank you, lawyer Alejo, for all your help that you gave me and my family. We are very grateful for all your support and great help. Thank you very much, Alejo.
The lawyer Alejo Lugo helped me with my case. He is very professional and his team is excellent. I highly recommend him if you need someone to represent you and help you.
Alejo lugo is great lawyer he is very professional and his work is put together really well I recommend for anyone facing criminal charges
Marisa was very kind and friendly during the call.
Highly recommended

Very bad experience in the criminal case, he is useless, he is a liar, he only stole my money in March 2024, he took my son's case, a criminal case, which he never did anything about, his services in regards to communication were very arrogant with both me and my son, I fired the lawyer in August 2024, he only had the case for a few months and he didn't return me a cent. On the contrary, he gave me a receipt for the expenses and I ended up owing him $2,000 when the contract stated a certain amount for two years, once I fired him, I ended up owing him. Please be very careful with this lawyer. At this time, my son has a new lawyer representing him, Earl Carter Associate. His lawyer is called Mr. Sandler and until now he has worked and represented him as every lawyer should. The communication has answered all my questions, and I am very satisfied with him and with his work. The moment he took the case, he gave my son all his evidence, something that Mr. Lugo never did, he always made excuses to not give us the evidence in my son's case. Please be very careful with this man, I do not recommend him.

I made an appointment for 'Political Asylum' (I explained the type of service I needed during the call). The day of the appointment arrived, and then they told me they don't handle this type of case. They referred me to a lawyer in Los Angeles, and I had to pay again for the consultation. Even though they referred you, you'll need to have both amounts available, so keep that in mind. I don't think they should schedule you and waste your time, especially since they don't offer this service.

The place is very well located, and the facilities and furniture look really nice, but it's a shame they don't offer this type of service and treat those of us seeking solutions this way. Jeremy Frost/Los Angeles.

I arrived on time for my appointment and he made me wait for more than 40 minutes, then he appeared and didn't give me any concrete answers. His only response was "I'm a good lawyer" and then he gave me his prices. His service sucks. I don't recommend him at all.
Really good attorney and helpful i Really recommend his service to everyone
I hired this attorney from my criminal case. He got my case dismissed. He did an Awesome job! I never even had to show up in court. I highly recommend this attorney.

They won't help you if your case requires work and fighting for you; they only take your case if it just involves filling out a form and that's it. They practically just want to fill out some paperwork and be done with it.
Alejo Lugo and staff were professional and helpful. I am great full for his services. If you are looking for someone who will have your back, it’s him.
The lawyer helped me a lot in my last case. This is the third case he's handled for me, and I'm very grateful and relieved. I had great communication with him. I highly recommend him!
The lawyers were friendly and helped me a lot with the whole team. And they got the charges dropped. Excellent work!
He's a good, recommended lawyer.
I do not recommend them.

reviews.text: I highly recommend Attorney Alejo Lugo, who has proven to be an honest, responsible, and professional person. I appreciate his dedication, efficiency, and ability. I sincerely appreciate the support my family has received. Thank you, Law Offices of Alejo Lugo & Associates.
100% recommended our lawyer Alejo Lugo, an excellent person and a support to all immigrants.
Vera helped me with my case and it was successful. It was stressing me out that I might lose but she assured me that I wasn’t. She was very good and confident and I thank her for that.
Attorney Alejo Lugo, thank you for helping me with this problem I'd had for years. Your work is very professional, and I definitely recommend you to anyone who needs legal help.
Alejo is a good lawyer. He cares about his clients, and many Latinos have benefited from his services. Call him for help with your legal situation.
I recommend attorney Alejo because he helps the Latino community.
I recommend him a lot, he help my parents with immigration case, and he has good employees and they are very kind, and very supportive and helpful, highly recommend.

Hello, my name is Olga Hernandez, I am Mexican, and I highly recommend attorney Alejo Lugo, as he helped me sort out my immigration papers. My case was a bit difficult, and thanks to him, I am now a resident!
We paid him about 6 thousand dollars to fix my husband and he did nothing nothing nothing
Bryan does great work, he's very friendly and full of information. Highly recommended!

Bryan Mason at Gavel Law Firm provided outstanding help with our real estate law needs. He's knowledgeable, responsive, and explains everything clearly. Made the whole process straightforward and stress-free.
Bryan explains every question and each process.  Very friendly.
Bryan was very helpful,respectful and with  very good attitude , I’m so thankful.
Great service and very knowledgeable. I'm happy to give 5 stars.
very knowledgeable and explains everything how it should be explained! thank you Bryan.
Knowledgeable and professional.
Great injury attorney. A pleasure to work with.
Authentic experience! Very helpful took me under his wing after listening to my troubles. Left with a clear game plan on how to handle the obstacles I’m dealing with!
Great service, very kind and helpful. Vary happy we found Gavel Law Firm.
I can’t say thank you enough for helping me with my case, I definitely recommend this law firm they go above and beyond.
Great friendly service.

Gavel Law Firm, P.C. is a reputable legal practice known for its professional approach and dedication to client success. The firm offers a broad range of legal services, with a particular focus on personal injury, family law, and criminal defense. What sets Gavel Law Firm apart is its client-first mentality—every case is handled with personalized attention, and the attorneys ensure that clients are well-informed and supported throughout the legal process.

The attorneys at Gavel Law Firm are highly knowledgeable and experienced, bringing a strong understanding of the law combined with a pragmatic approach to problem-solving. They make it a priority to explain complex legal jargon in clear terms, ensuring clients fully understand their options and the steps moving forward. The firm also prides itself on its transparency, providing clear billing practices and prompt responses to any inquiries.

One of the standout qualities of Gavel Law Firm is its commitment to achieving favorable outcomes. Whether it’s securing a favorable settlement in a personal injury case or providing strong defense in criminal matters, the team works tirelessly to protect their clients’ best interests.

Overall, Gavel Law Firm, P.C. is an excellent choice for anyone seeking legal representation. Their professionalism, knowledge, and dedication to client service make them a standout in the legal community.
Great service awesome attention to their clients needs…I highly recommend them 👍
Great experience and knowledgeable
I cannot express my gratitude enough in this difficult situation I went through, having Gavel law firm in my corner gave me peace of mind.
I am so thankful for Bryan’s legal advice. He was very knowledgeable and experienced. I will definitely be recommending him to others.
Knowledgeable and professional, answered all my questions. Thank you for everything Gavel Law Firm!
Bryan Mason is the best! He did exactly what he said he was going. He is very reliable and dependable. Do yourself a favor and make the call. It will be the most painless thing you do.
Awesome experience throughout the whole process! Would definitely recommend and which I already have.. thanks again!

Working with Gavel Law Firm has been an absolute pleasure! Their team is not only highly professional but also incredibly friendly and easy to work with.

It's always great to work with a client who values clear communication and professionalism while maintaining such a positive and approachable attitude. We appreciate the partnership and look forward to continuing our work together!

Knowledgeable and approachable. It’s rare to find a lawyer who is both extremely knowledgeable and approachable, but Bryan Mason at Gavel Law Firm is exactly that. He took the time to answer all my questions and made sure I felt comfortable every step of the way. I highly recommend them.
Bryan was awesome set up my trust and thoroughly explained everything i would recomend his services to anyone! Thank you again!

I cannot express enough gratitude for the exceptional legal support I received during a challenging time following my catastrophic injury.
From our very first meeting, Bryan demonstrated not only expertise in personal injury law but also genuine compassion and understanding of my situation. They took the time to listen to my concerns, answered all my questions patiently, and made sure I was informed every step of the way.
Their attention to detail and thorough preparation made me feel confident in my case. They fought tirelessly on my behalf, negotiating with insurance companies and ensuring that I received the compensation I deserved.
What truly sets them apart is their unwavering support and empathy. They treated me like more than just a client; they were a true advocate during one of the toughest times in my life. I am incredibly thankful for their hard work and dedication. I highly recommend Bryan to anyone in need of expert legal representation for catastrophic injuries. You won't find a better ally in your corner!
I would like to thank the attorney Bryan Mason at gavellawfirm for helping me to resolved my legal issues.

Bryan Mason has been the best attorney for our family. He handled my wife’s accident with such ease and professionalism. Bryan is very prompt, informative, and compassionate to what we were dealing with. I highly recommend Bryan and will recommend him to any and everyone! If you need an accident attorney, he is your man!
Very good lawyers

I was constantly kept informed about the progress of my case, which provided much-needed peace of mind during a difficult time. Their expertise and experience were evident throughout, and it ultimately led to a favorable outcome.

I can't thank my personal injury attorney enough for their support during this challenging chapter in my life. I highly recommend Miracle Law. From start to finish, my experience with them was completely positive. I called Tamar when I was in a car accident last August.

If you ever go through the same traumatic experience as I did, call Miracle Law for a free consultation so they can address your concerns and needs as they did for me.

You won’t regret it.

Last October I got in a car accident, when the other driver failed to stop at a stop sign and t-boned me. This was the first time something like this had happened to me and I didn’t know what to do.

The next day I called Miracle Law and they immediately reviewed my case and provided me with their analysis. I had never worked with a personal injury office before so I was a little nervous about the process.

However, my attorney Tamar was honest and communicative in each step of the way. I don’t think I could have been more relaxed throughout this process if I had used any other office. She answered any questions I had and reassured me that the concerns I had were normal.

I am so glad that the first thing I did was call these lawyers after my accident and I highly recommend them to anyone who has been injured in a car accident.

My husband and I were rear ended in a car accident on a busy street and I came across Miracle Law’s website. I received a free consultation, where they thoroughly explained the litigation process. We decided to hire Tamar as our attorney and we have not regretted the decision since.

They communicated with us constantly and kept us updated as to the status of our case. If any issues arose regarding the case, they made sure to ask about our input. We felt heard and in control as our decisions were used to move our case forward.

I highly recommend this firm to my friends and family. They provided me with very personalized legal service, which I didn’t feel like I would have gotten at any other firm.

I was astonished at how quickly she was able to recognize and address my concerns and needs. I'd recommend giving Tamar and Miracle Law a call to anyone.

In 2021, I got in a car accident. It was the worst experience in my life, but it could have been even worse if I had not chosen Miracle Law to represent me throughout this journey.

If you are ever in need of an attorney, call Miracle Law.

reviews.text:
I was in a couple of accidents and was originally with another law firm that wasn’t communicating or making progress. They’d go weeks without updates, and every time I called, they had no new information. Thankfully, someone I met through Uber recommended DahDah Law Group, and it turned out to be one of the best decisions I’ve made.

From the first call with Martha, I felt comfortable. She took the time to listen to everything I had been through and was honest about how long cases can take depending on the situation. That honesty right away made me feel good. Even though I live in San Fernando and their office is in Riverside, she didn’t hesitate to take my case.

Martha and her daughters, Adrianna and Nicey, jumped on my cases immediately. They always kept me informed, gave me updates without me having to call them, and treated me like family. Adrianna was also great, patient, kind, and always took time to answer my questions even when she was busy.

What really made a difference was how much they cared beyond just my accident cases. I mentioned to Martha that I was dealing with a difficult personal situation, a family court issue where I lost time with my kids due to poor representation from another attorney. Martha and Adrianna took the time to look into it and helped guide me on how to see my children again. They even helped me with some landlord issues I was having at the time.

This team truly goes above and beyond. They didn’t just treat me like another client, they cared about me as a person. Even though their main focus is accident cases, they went out of their way to help me in other areas of my life. If you’re looking for a law firm that actually cares, communicates, and fights for you, DahDah Law Group is the one to call.

reviews.text: I cannot recommend this law firm enough. They made my divorce process quick, straightforward, and stress-free. Mrs. DahDah and her team were professional, attentive, and ensured I got everything I needed. Their guidance and expertise gave me confidence during a difficult time. If you're looking for a firm that truly has your back, this is the one to choose.
Martha DahDah has always helped me with the best advice and everything has always turned out as she says. She is very knowledgeable and experienced. 100% Trust  Martha DahDah.

I am appalled at the level of unprofessionalism displayed by Dahdah Law Firm. The communication I received from their office addressed me as “Dear Disciple of Christ,” which was both inappropriate and unsettling. The only way this law firm could have obtained that personal detail was by searching through my Facebook profile—a completely unnecessary and invasive act.

This kind of behavior raises serious concerns about their boundaries and professionalism. Rather than focusing on my case, it seems they invested time in snooping through my personal life to use it in correspondence. Such actions are not only irrelevant to legal matters but also reflect poorly on their judgment and ethics.

If you’re looking for a law firm that handles cases with professionalism and integrity, I strongly urge you to look elsewhere. My experience with Dahdah Law Firm was deeply disappointing and unnerving.

EDIT:
This response from DahDah Law Firm is misleading. Let me clarify: this firm did absolutely nothing to convince me to dismiss my case. It was the claims team from their client’s insurance company who reached out and persuaded me to act in good faith after explaining their client’s circumstances.

Throughout the entire process, this law firm demonstrated significant negligence and a lack of professionalism. From their inappropriate communication to their dismissive and condescending tone, they failed to meet even the most basic standards of conduct. My decision to dismiss the case was made out of consideration for their client’s situation, not because of any actions by this firm.

It’s important that the truth is reflected in this matter, and I stand by my review of their unprofessional behavior.
reviews.ownerResponse:
PLEASE DO NOT BE MISLED by this review. This person, Mark Perez is NOT my client. He has NEVER been my client or a client of this firm. This man is very upset and appalled because my firm and I did an amazing job defending our client from his capricious and meritless lawsuit that he filed against my client. My client and her son are extremely pleased and grateful for our assistance and intervention. She no longer has to go to court and does not have to worry about this frivolous lawsuit that was causing her a lot of emotional distress. If anyone has any questions about this, please feel free to call me. 951-274-0533 Martha

My office engaged in an extensive investigation of this matter and collaborated at length with the insurance company, so yes myself and my team helped achieve a very favorable outcome for our client because once this man was confronted with the facts, he chose to dismiss the lawsuit. It is not uncommon for adverse parties to become very angry and upset when they do not get their way, but NEVER before has an opposing party been so upset and vindictive so as to post a negative review against me. This man is NOT my client , NEVER has been and does not not know me. I owe no duty to this man. My duty is to serve my client. This man's negative review is evidence that we did a great job for my client!!

reviews.ownerResponse:
Good Morning John, I dont show you in my database as a client under the name of John Jacob but in reply to your assertion that we are not committed to our clients is totally untrue. Trial is the worst option 90% of the time in a workers compensation case since the future medical stays open at the end of the trial and the client only receives small biweekly payments till the amount of the award is paid in full. The issue of the value of the injury itself is rather cut and dry based upon the doctors reporting of the disability involved and your attorney and the courts use the same rating system making trial on that issue unnecessary. Generally the only cases that go to trial is where the Employer has challenged the truthfulness of the alleged injury or the doctors assessment of apportionment to non-industrial factors.
As you must realize the attorney gets paid based upon the gross settlement and so it stands to reason he is not about to leave any money on the table so he and the client win.
No case is ever settled without the clients approval, this is not a back room deal done in the dark behind anyone's back. Every settlement is done with both the client's and the JUDGE"S approval for adequacy.
Please be so honorable to reconsider your most horrible review which truly hurst myself and my family.

Attorney Willis has provides useful and detailed information to assist those seeking estate planning.

I am thankful to have found a really good attorney for our living trust. She was thorough, and explained in detail. I'm glad we came to her because I have encountered others living trusts and they are vague or don't cover what was covered in ours, which was everything. Anyone will be 100% satisfied in choosing this firm.
Very knowledgable and warm professionals to work with in getting our wills prepared!  Highly recommend this firm.

The Law office of Tanya L. Wills was very helpful to me and my family. Taylor and Tanya were able to tell us the difference between power of attorney and conservatorship and which one was beneficial for me and our family. They were honest, straightforward, and had answers to all our questions. Thank you so much for helping us with our situation.

I greatly recommend The Tanya Willis law office. I was provided with an abundance of advice, ample time for all questions to be answered. I experienced respect, compassion and a willingness to be of service to my needs. There was no pressure in a return visit. I highly recommend this office to people in need of legal advice.
Taylor was amazing in the time spent talking to me.  He was extremely honest and helpful.  I would definitely come back to this firm!

Very tardy reply but really heartfelt work by Law Offices of Tanya L Willis specifically Attorney Taylor D. Fennell. We are very pleased and thank you so much for your genuine caring approach and professional legal service. Best wishes.

Taylor was so helpful and took the time to answer all my questions and concerns. He was very knowledgeable and explained things to me so I can understand. He also made me see risks and benefits from each of the services we discussed. I 100% recommend this law office.

I was referred to Tanya's office by another attorney who thought Tanya's expertise would be better for my family's particular situation. I sent a message with some basic details and got a call from Taylor who conducted an intake interview over the phone and setup a phone appointment with Tanya. Taylor called the day of the appointment to let me know their event was running about 15 minutes over; I appreciated the professionalism. Tanya and I spoke at length about my family's situation. She went above and beyond to get a complete picture and provided practical options for us to consider based on our history and background. She was interested in what I had to say and asked questions to be sure. I thought I could figure out estate planning on my own and I'd spoken to a few other attorneys who talked more than listened to what I had to say and gave me one option and a price - I ended up with more questions than answers. I feel much more prepared after speaking with Tanya!
I’m always glad to have the opportunity to recommend Sonia. She’s helped me and my family.    She’s a true professional With decades of knowledge
Great information. I suggest that you contact this office immediately and schedule a free consultation to know which documents will work best for you for your own peace of mind.
Thank you so much for ensuring my family and small business  are safe. I truly appreciated the understanding and compassion demonstrated during my initial consultation and value your expertise.
April Webinar was informative. Motivational and inspiring. Plan to put into action some of the strategies that were discussed. Thank you!

Tanya Willis is something that’s very hard to find… she’s a trifecta; she communicates, she’s considerate and she’s cooperative! I live across the country and Ms. Willis treated me like I was in her living room! If you or anyone you love needs help with probate or estate planning, please do yourself a favor and contact Tanya Willis! She is what you want/need! Thank you again, Tanya 🙏

Attorney Willis was highly professional, thorough, and innovative in her approach to my estate planning. She was relatable and attended to listening in ways that evolved my understanding and decision making. This was a Class A experience. She’s amazing!!!
We worked with Taylor. He is a good listener and addressed all our issues in a timely and thorough manner. He is a pleasure to work with, understanding and professional. We were not rushed.

She was the worst layer ever. It took her 7 years to close our civil case. She lied to us and never had our paperwork ready. She didn't even want to see us on our last meeting with her. She had her assistant explain our case when she was the one to explain it to us. I will not recommend her.  I am an actual client who tells the truth. I even feel we got stolen money from our case. We had a lot of missing receipts. Be careful with her and her son. Tanya went on vacation when she had our settlement money and told me her son was working on the case. I never got to speak to him or meet him. Tanya took her sweet time to give us our settlement money. If l could, l will give her 0 stars. Tanya is a very irresponsible and inconsiderate lawyer. Be careful if you choose her to be your lawyer or her son, whom l have never met or spoken with.

The information that Tanya shared regarding the interplay of Wills, Trusts and Probate was so very valuable!  Her use of real life personal examples left much to think about.  I'm a real estate agent and, unfortunately,  many homeowners have not taken the steps necessary to protect their home for their heirs.  I will attend all future events.  Thank you so very much!

Was able to attend a seminar in regards to Estate planning, was super informative and offered great insight for not only myself but my family and parents. Would highly recommend going through the Law Offices of Tanya L. Willis for knowledge and planning support!

Tanya is kind, professional and patience, she is the one who makes me feel the legal terms are not that difficult for me by explaining the cases instead of only terms.
Strongly recommended.

Just attended an informative session by California's top estate attorney, Tanya L. Willis, of the Law Offices Of Tanya L Willis. Her expertise in estate planning is unparalleled with over 30 years of experience. I highly recommend Tanya and her team for all your estate planning needs. Estate Planning  California Attorney Legal Expert Tanya L. Willis Thank you, Mrs. Willis, for providing such valuable information to the community today.

Appreciate you Tanya Willis and staff for an eye opening presentation today. It is heart warming to know you also work with legal plans in the area which can be very helpful to many of our clients that we serve.  Stay well and blessed.

I love your passion and education you e done for us today 6/12/24.

I do want to know more so will get on your next webinars.
Great information about estate planning, especially avoiding probate.
Tanya was so helpful with some questions I had with a legal matter. Very great full of the time she spent with me!

I truly highly recommend Attorney Tanya Willis to provide you and your family one of the most important documents, a Living Trust, to protect your estate, be it a simple or a grand one.

Atty. Tanya was/is a consummate professional, superb and sincere, as she delivered for me and my spouse a comprehensive, customized, and compassionate Family Trust.

Her and her team including Mikayla, are 1st in class; from the very first intake call to each interview and interaction, to the delivery of a detailed Trust specific to our family and long term plans.

To protect and safeguard your assets and secure generational wealth for you and your heirs, I enthusically encourage you to set up an appointment for a cousultation with Atty. Tanya ASAP. She is the very best!!

A woman of the upmost character whom have demonstrated to me and my spouse someone who cares about her clients with total integrity, detailed and comprehensive intelligence, and indepth interested counsel resulting in our absolute satisfaction and appreciation.

Bottom line, schedule a consultation and you will have the opportunity to see the benefits of having Atty. Tanya Willis serve you and your family with this set of essential legal documents.

To protect your hard earned  assets, avoid probate, and pass on your treasures as you designate, a Trust is essential. Atty. Willis has proven to us that she and her team are the professionals to support your engaged evaluation, your proactive process, and your strategic and smart long term decision.

Thank you Atty. Tanya Willis. You have played a significant role in our families living legacy!

Law Office of Tanya Wills,  It was a pleasure in completing my Living Trust. Guided me through the entire process Very professional with a wealth of knowledge. The staff are very helpful and attentive. My experience was very positive. Like to say Thank You to an excellent team...

They also take the time to get to know you and ask questions about the requests you make to ensure what you ask them to do is actually what you though it would do.  This team is simply amazing!!!

Willis convinced that she was the person whom we wanted to prepare our estate planning. Atty. Willis and her team, Taylor F., Cheyenne H. and Mikaela, made the process effortless. We recommend that anyone who is in need of estate planning to contact the Law Offices Of Tanya L. Willis in Upland, California.
This office exudes of professional, attentive, empathic, and knowledgeable team!
Tnya is so knowledgeable and such a valuable resource. Sometimes talking about estate planning isnt the most comfortable thing to do but you are in good hands with Tanya!
Tanya is very knowledgeable and trustworthy in creating your estate plan. She wrote my Trust, Power of Attorney, and Medical directives. She has great attention to detail and cares about your family.

Tanya is an Amazing Lawyer!!!!! Just when you think you have nothing else to learn, Tanya will reach back out with stronger than ever sound advice. Her meticulous and unwavering work ethic thrives in her practice. I can not recommend her enough!!!

Thank You Tanya!!!

I just want to say thank you to Tanya who was a wealth of information for me for a crazy situation regarding my aunt's Living Trust. Tanya was honest straightforward and even though there were some things I didn't want to hear, I got a clear understanding of the law and
what I need to do in regards to this trust. After a lengthy conversation I felt like I was talking to a friend. Tanya is extremely knowledgeable regarding Trust Law, and at at the end of my consultation she left me with hope and great advice. I will be using her services in the future and would recommend her to anyone who needs legal assistance and advice regarding Trust and Wills.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Tammy,

Thank you for your feedback. We were contacted by the Successor Trustee several days before your post and we addressed the issue within 24 hours of the matter being brought to our attention. This was an unusual situation but certainly one we would like to prevent in the future. It was at the height of COVID, the recorder’s office had been closed for months due to the pandemic and it was right before Christmas. Nonetheless, because of your father’s physical limitations, my assistant and I made a house call during a time when it was difficult to get a notary, let alone an attorney, to come to one’s home. In the midst of all of this, we made a mistake. As you can see from other reviews, we take pride in caring for our clients. The Law Offices of Tanya L. Willis has 44 Five Star Reviews not because we’re perfect but because overwhelmingly, our clients – especially our Estate Planning clients – have a positive experience. And if we do make a mistake, we work really, really hard to resolve it to our client’s satisfaction. If you need anything further, you have already been provided with my personal cell phone number.

Tanya L. Willis, Esq.
